posts.text:
How else do you explain quitting your job and going on a PR tour the very next day to betray the people who hired you? And that’s putting aside abandoning all your prior beliefs.

The game is afoot…

Here’s my guess, and I look forward to the internet calling me on this one way or another…

He’s been caught as a leaker and knows it, so he resigned to get ahead of the story, and then decided to join the Tucker/Candace loony hour to mobilize the Trump hating clones in his favor.

Now we wait and see…


Shelby Talcott (@ShelbyTalcott)

News: Joe Kent is under FBI investigation for allegedly leaking classified information, three sources tell me. I’m told the investigation pre-dates his departure

Jacquelyn Kennedy she is not…


Jon Levine (@LevineJonathan)

NEW from me

Rama Duwaji — the wife of NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani— shared several posts glorifying Palestinian terrorism on old social media accounts that remain active.

Duwaji also used the N-word.

freebeacon.com/democrats/zoh…




— https://nitter.net/LevineJonathan/status/2034391696578863227#m

There’s not point in talking about her anymore other than to chuckle at the retardmaxxing and griftslop…


Ian Miles Cheong (@ianmiles)

Candace Owens has been claiming that Netanyahu is dead and that all the videos of him are hyper realistic AI generated slop. She was embarrassed by her own producer, whom I’m sure she is going to fire very promptly, right after she stated that a video of Netanyahu meeting with Mike Huckabee was fake.

The producer informed her that Bibi was giving a live press

In the end we all have to choose who to believe.

So you can either believe Trump, Rubio, Hegseth, and the director of the CIA, or you can believe the guy who just booked himself on Candace and Tucker.

Your call…


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

BREAKING: CIA Director John Ratcliffe says Joe Kent was completely wrong to say Iran did not pose an imminent threat.

Kent was kept out of all briefings over fears that he was leaking intel.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/20342991658118476

We're LIVE! 

WATCH HERE: shorturl.at/Wx3UJ

Interesting…


Erikaaa (@ErikaC47)

Over on Facebook, 99% of Tuckers replies are negative. 🤣🤡

This manufactured outrage is not real life. It’s a psyop. And, all assets are being deployed. But they threw their Hail Mary too soon. President Trump caught them all.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ErikaC47/status/2034106726438387794#m

This was at NatCon in October, 2021.

The plan to destroy wide tent, pro America MAGA has been there for years.


James Lindsay, anti-Communist (@ConceptualJames)

Here's a video clip of a conversation from a couple years ago. See if you can recognize any new vocabulary words in it!

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ConceptualJames/status/2034119408658915675#m

I’ve only met Joe once, it was at dinner after a Tulsi was sworn in. We had a nice chat.

Obviously there’s much more to this story but to immediately go to those two podcasts tells you this is a planned op and there is something else going on.

Putting aside everything else, the fact that he’d immediately book the two biggest anti-Trump podcasts tells you it’s good that he no longer works for the administration.

Now we just wait and count the incoming lies…


Laura Loomer (@LauraLoomer)

Candace Owens and Tucker Carlson have both announced they are interviewing Joe Kent this week. 

Kent resigned from his job as Director of the National Counter Terrorism Center less than 12 hours ago and he is already booked on the shows of 2 of the b

🚨 @AndrewKolvet on Candace Owens attacking Erika Kirk:

"I'm obviously on team 'you shouldn't be attacking widows...' the Bible is very clear that going after widows is a very bad idea"

"Erika never sought the limelight, and was always very supportive of Charlie... Charlie told us multiple times: if anything happens to me, Erika would be in charge"

"The Attacks on Erika [by Candace] are abhorrent, diabolical, and gross"

Video

🚨 @AndrewKolvet on Tucker Carlson GLAZING Nick Fuentes shortly after Charlie Kirk's death: 

"I told Tucker I didn't love the way that interview happened, and I don't think Charlie would have too..."

Video

Oh deport this guy already.


New York Post (@nypost)

Mamdani rips 'genocide' in Palestine during St. Patrick’s Day event trib.al/kRgdXvX

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/nypost/status/2033917935010390095#m

Oh just deport her already…


TheBlaze (@theblaze)

Ilhan Omar on Pete Hegseth: "He's always been pretty pathetic. It pains me as a Minnesotan. He's an embarrassment on the national and international stage."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/theblaze/status/2034015778429714580#m
See you in a few days, Hungary!

The plot thickens…


Buzz Patterson (@BuzzPatterson)

There’s more to the Joe Kent story than meets the eye. According to friends, apparently, Joe leaked intelligence under the nose of the Secretary of War. As a result, his access to classified information was removed several weeks ago. He’s not stepping down due to his allegiance to integrity, he’s being forced to leave.



— https://nitter.net/BuzzPatterson/status/2033945609561112675#m
